name: Animation
description: Animation Process. This computer graphics process visualization demonstrates animation techniques and motion generation. The flowchart shows animation inputs and keyframe generation, animation methods and motion interpolation, animation operations and timeline processing, intermediate results, and final animation outputs.

W2 --> Y2[Animation Final Result]
